leadText: Shadow Blitz (Japanese: ダークアタック Dark Attack) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Blitz is a Shadow equivalent of the basic damage moves Pokémon often know at Level 1, such as Pound , Scratch , and Tackle . Shadow Blitz inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Blitz cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A Pokémon throws this tackle while casting a shadowy aura.
